name: 揭露型（朝堂秘密）
description: 皇帝當眾揭露自己最深層的秘密，用極具衝擊力的獨白改變所有人的認知。這類對白是劇情反轉的核心載體。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: As soon as I pulled back the covers, I saw a palace maid in her 30s, old enough to be a wet nurse, completely undressed right there on my bed. I was terrified back then and ordered her to get out, but she shamelessly kept clinging to me.
